text:
Market today: Inflation easing a bit is good, but IBM's huge profit warning is spooking tech hardware and likely dragging on chip sentiment.
Your holdings: SOXL is still a problem at -30.59%, and SPAL is also deep underwater at -36.78%. Both are leveraged and need attention.
Watch: Keep an eye on IBM's fallout. It could pressure broader tech and chip names.
Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged, losing positions and the potential spillover from IBM.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or cutting losses given the -30.59% PnL and leveraged nature.
SPAL: Same as SOXL, assess cutting losses on this leveraged position down -36.78%.
AMD: Scanner shows a BUY setup (entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95) on strong intraday bias, but IBM news adds risk.
